text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Hanshin J.F. is about to begin, and I'm
starting to feel the pressure...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But Air Groove, for her part, seems even more
focused than ever.
choice_data_list: You never fail to impress me.
You never fail to impress me.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: You fool. You're only supposed to praise me after a successful race.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: You just sit back and watch.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I'll show you a race worthy of the title "Empress."
